quotes: We finally hired our third CSM and our 'process' fell apart.
Sales dumps notes into HubSpot but our onboarding tasks live in Boardly—things slip.
pain_points: Customers go dark before first value
objections: Do we need a heavy CS tool?
verbatim_description: It feels like a CS-specific onboarding engine that activates tasks when users actually do (or don't do) things.
reason: Prebuilt playbooks + HubSpot integration; set up in a day
notes: Saw quick wins with usage-triggered 'kickoff not scheduled' nudge

quotes: I copy/paste the same checklist for every customer.
If they don't log in by week two, I scramble.
triggers: Missed two renewals due to poor onboarding
objections: Will this replace our project tool?
verbatim_description: Playbooks that actually fire from usage signals so I don't babysit.
reason: Usage-trigger tasks + customer checklist kept buyers engaged
notes: Adopted 'first-value' playbook tied to feature activation

quotes: We need multi-product reporting and custom health scoring.
objections: Your reporting looks light for our needs
verbatim_description: Too lightweight for how we run CS.
notes: Asked for advanced SLA dashboards and multi-product rollups

quotes: We rely on one spreadsheet; if I’m out, no one knows status.
verbatim_description: Simple templates that push tasks based on usage. Setup was quick.
notes: Adopted HubSpot integration + Stripe renewal reminders

quotes: I need onboarding to run itself when someone hasn’t connected the API.
verbatim_description: Onboarding autopilot tied to product events; way faster than Boardly.

quotes: We don’t have time to set anything up.
verbatim_description: Nice but might be overkill for now.
notes: Might revisit after hiring more CSMs

quotes: We’re standardizing globally and need advanced reporting.
verbatim_description: Great for onboarding, not for our global CS ops.
notes: Wanted Okta SSO and data warehouse sync

quotes: Our activation rate tanked when we hired more reps.
verbatim_description: Playbooks connected to usage and HubSpot close the handoff gap.
reason: Templates + Slack alerts for no-login at day 3
